title: Advanced Copper
description: Advanced Copper is a mod that allow you to make the full set of copper included paxel, hammer and excavator. The copper is a bit worse than Iron but much better than Stone
body:
# ![Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0a4f3fb2e0b50d771689d2faccfa4e1adf0c3a.png) Advanced Copper ![Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0a4f3fb2e0b50d771689d2faccfa4e1adf0c3a.png)

Advanced Copper is a mod that allow you to make the full set of copper included paxel, hammer and excavator. The copper set is a little below than iron but better than stone diamond, its and intermediate step between those two.

## ![Copper Armor, Tools And Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e1bbdf714df40f6c90d9bb787ea3dae083dd086.gif) Copper Armor, Tools And Weapons Stats:

2.0.0 Fix the armor textures bug and changes a little the advancements spanish translation

1.5.0 Adds the Spanish translation and upgrades a little the In-Game description
